show_overview: PAW Patrol is a CG action-adventure preschool series starring a pack of six heroic puppies led by a tech-savvy 10-year-old boy named Ryder.

episodes.name: Pups and the Kitty-tastrophe
episodes.summary: Ryder and the PAW Patrol save a lost kitty from the bay, only to watch her create mayhem on land. Marshall finally rescues her from high atop City Hall! The kitty's owner is overjoyed that Ryder and the PAW Patrol returned her precious pet!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Train
episodes.summary: A rock slide has trapped Katie and Cali on a train on the old trestle bridge! Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to clear the tracks and free the train before more boulders tumble down.

episodes.name: Pup Pup Boogie
episodes.summary: The PAW Patrol must work quickly to fix the tracks and remove a train car at the train station, before the next train comes. But when Rubble hurts his paw, Ryder has to teach Chase how to use Rubble's digger.

episodes.name: Pups in a Fog
episodes.summary: When the bulb in the Adventure Bay lighthouse goes out, Ryder and the PAW Patrol battle the clock and thick fog as they try to fix the light in time to get their good friend Cap'n Turbot back home safely.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Sea Turtles
episodes.summary: Baby sea turtles were hatching at the other side of the road near the beach. They can't get to the beach without crossing the street, there are cars, skateboarders, scooters and all the hungry naughty seagulls around, not to mention Alex's rambunctious antics. Will the PAW Patrol be able to get them across the road without any danger?

episodes.name: Pups and the Very Big Baby
episodes.summary: A baby whale has beached herself. The PAW Patrol has to rescue her and make sure her mother doesn't get too close. Can they save her and reunite her with her mother?

episodes.name: Pups Save the Circus
episodes.summary: Ellie, the baby elephant from the Circus train, has escaped and is loose in Adventure Bay! Now Eunice, her mom, is loose and looking for her. Can the PAW Patrol find Ellie and calm Eunice down?

episodes.name: Pup a Doodle Do
episodes.summary: Mayor Goodway's purse chicken, Chickaletta, is on the loose and the PAW Patrol must find her before it's too late for Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta to host Hello, Adventure Bay!.

episodes.name: Pup Pup Goose
episodes.summary: Marshall gets a new BFF when a gosling named "Fuzzy" takes a liking to him. Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to figure out a way to get Fuzzy to join his flock when they fly south, because he won't leave Marshall!

episodes.name: Pup Pup and Away
episodes.summary: When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the PAW Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race!

episodes.name: Pups Pit Crew
episodes.summary: The PAW Patrol must help Alex fix his super-trike, and teach him the art of patience and taking things slowly. But when Alex goes too fast the PAW Patrol goes on a high speed chase to save Alex.

episodes.name: Pups Fight Fire
episodes.summary: Marshall is going to try to break the record for the World's Fastest Fire-Pup. But he accidentally broke his ladder during practice, and now he's not feeling very confident in himself. Can the rest of the PAW Patrol help their droopy pup-pal regain his fiery confidence?

episodes.name: Pups Save the Bunnies
episodes.summary: A bunch of adorable bunnies have come to Farmer Yumi's carrot patch. The PAW Patrol must catch them all and relocate them to a perfect new home. Can the pups help the bunnies and Farmer Yumi?

episodes.name: Pup-Tacular
episodes.summary: While the rest of the PAW Patrol are out to rescue Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta and checking the trucks, Rocky must face his aquaphobia so that Katie can enter him in the Pup-Tacular show. If he doesn't, Katie might have to miss it and wait for the Cat-Tacular, which isn't coming anytime soon.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Bay
episodes.summary: There's an oil spill in the bay, and a baby whale swam into the oil. The PAW Patrol must clean up the baby whale and the oil spill before more animals living in Adventure Bay are harmed by it. Can the pups clean it up before any more animals get hurt?

episodes.name: Pups Save a Goodway
episodes.summary: It's Great-Great-Great-Great-Grandpa Grover Day, and Mayor Goodway has been planning anxiously for today's celebration. She sent the statue of her Great-Great-Great-Great-Grandfather, Grover Goodway to be cleaned. However, on the way back from the cleaner's, the statue fell in Adventure Bay. The PAW Patrol must dive down to the bottom to get the statue.

episodes.name: Pups Get a Rubble
episodes.summary: This episode is a flashback story of how Rubble joined the PAW Patrol. Rubble must help Jake when he gets trapped in an avalanche.

episodes.name: Pups Save A Walrus
episodes.summary: The playful walrus, Wally, was performing tricks for Cap'n Turbot, but he eventually gets himself tangled in a fishing net during one of his tricks. The PAW Patrol must rescue him before he drowns.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Treats
episodes.summary: On a snow and icy day, Mr. Porter's van ends up sliding on ice. If the ice cracks, it will fall into the bottom of the bay, and inside of the truck has all the pups' treats and food in it! Can Ryder, Zuma, and Chase save the truck before they break the ice?

episodes.name: Pups Get a Lift
episodes.summary: Katie and Cali are stuck on Jake's Mountain. Rubble wants Ryder to pick him but he picks Marshall and Rocky. Rubble becomes sad. Later on, Rubble is chosen to make a staircase to get Katie and Cali down because the hill is too steep for Marshall's truck.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Hoedown
episodes.summary: The PAW Patrol are having a great time at the Adventure Bay Hoedown, but trouble starts to brew when Farmer Al's cows get spooked out and are on the loose in Adventure Bay. Can the PAW Patrol get the cows back to safety before they stampede into the hoedown?

episodes.name: Pups Save Alex
episodes.summary: While Cali is playing with her favorite toy on Farmer Yumi's farm, she gets stuck on the top of the silo, which is not safe. The PAW Patrol must help the frightened cat before she falls, and only Alex has the solution.

episodes.name: Pups and the Ghost Pirate
episodes.summary: A Halloween party turns into a spooky time when there's a ghostly figure roaming around on a ship. Can the PAW Patrol solve the paranormal mystery and save the Halloween party?

episodes.name: Pups Save a School Day
episodes.summary: It's Alex's first day of school, but he has lost his backpack! So the PAW Patrol agrees to help him find it. Easier said than done when Alex says that his backpack could be in many places around Adventure Bay, prompting all the pups to be deployed to all corners of the city, not to mention they have limited time before the school bus arrives. Can the PAW Patrol get the backpack before the school bus picks Alex up?

episodes.name: Pups Turn on the Lights
episodes.summary: It's Chase's birthday and the other pups and Katie are setting up Chase's surprise birthday party at Katie's Clinic. But their hopes for a surprise is on the line when a strong wind breaks the blade of the windmill on the wind turbine, causing a blackout. Can the PAW Patrol get the power back on in time for Chase's surprise birthday party?

episodes.name: Pups Save a Pool Day
episodes.summary: It's a hot day and the pups head for the water park, but the pool is empty! The water tower that pumps water into the pool is tilted and has a bent pipe. Can the PAW Patrol fill the pool so everyone can enjoy their day?

episodes.name: Circus Pupformers
episodes.summary: The PAW Patrol, for the first time must all work together to help Eunice and Ellie save the circus when most of the performers are late. Can the PAW Patrol help them?

episodes.name: Pups Make a Splash
episodes.summary: Cap'n Turbot's boat has crashed into a rock and is sinking! Ryder and the PAW Patrol leap into action. As Ryder and Zuma tow the boat to safety, Rocky and Skye team up to patch it so it stays afloat long enough to get it to the dock. Everyone stays high and dry - except Rocky!

episodes.name: Pups Save Christmas
episodes.summary: Santa's sleigh crashes and breaks in a snowstorm on Christmas Eve, and all of the presents are scattered across Adventure Bay. It's up to the PAW Patrol to fix the sleigh, round up the reindeer, find the presents, find the magic star, and most of all, save Christmas for Adventure Bay.

episodes.name: Pups on Ice
episodes.summary: The snowy days have returned to Adventure Bay, and the pups decide to go to Jake's mountain to go snowboarding. However, Jake and Alex end up between a "rock and cold place." Can the PAW Patrol rescue them? If they don't hurry, Ryder could fall on them. Will they get Alex up?

episodes.name: Pups and the Snow Monster
episodes.summary: There's a mystery at Jake's mountain, and it's scaring away all the people who came to ski. The PAW Patrol must find out who or what left strange snow tracks. Could it be a Snow Monster? If they don't find what it is, they might have to close the slopes forever!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Super Pup
episodes.summary: Rubble pretends to be "Apollo the Super-Pup", a superhero pup on TV who saves the day by himself. But his superhero phase gets him and the train engineer trapped in a tunnel behind a rock slide. Can the PAW Patrol save the train, the conductor, and Rubble?

episodes.name: Pups Save Ryder's Robot
episodes.summary: When Ryder's new robot pup goes haywire, the pups must stop it so Ryder can fix it. If they don't hurry, bad things could happen.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Hoot
episodes.summary: The PAW Patrol must save Mama Hootie before the tree she is in falls in the bay. Will the PAW Patrol help save Little Hootie's Mama?

episodes.name: Pups Go All Monkey
episodes.summary: A monkey named Mandy has escaped the train car that is supposed to be taking her to the jungle. She is now driving Mr. Porter's van around Adventure Bay, and it's up to the PAW Patrol to catch her.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Toof
episodes.summary: Chase's tooth gets loose, but he doesn't want to see the dentist because he is scared. Meanwhile, Alex must visit the dentist, but he's afraid too, so the pups and Ryder help him face his fear by showing him their own fears.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Bat
episodes.summary: A baby bat takes a nap inside of a bell, and the pups try to rescue it without awakening it. The PAW Patrol chase it around Adventure Bay and try to save it.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Easter Egg Hunt
episodes.summary: It's Adventure Bay's annual Easter Egg Hunt and the pups are helping Mayor Goodway with the egg decorating. The hunt for a very special egg leads Ryder and the PAW Patrol on an exciting adventure.

episodes.name: Pups and the Lighthouse Boogie
episodes.summary: Mayor Goodway and Alex take a rowboat out into the bay to get a closer look at a narwhal whale. A storm is approaching though and the rowboat drifts out of control towards the sea. It's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue them!

episodes.name: Pups Save Ryder
episodes.summary: While out on a hike, Ryder discovers that Garbie the goat is stuck on the edge of a cliff! He attempts to rescue Garbie, but gets stranded himself in the process. He calls the pups for help, but Garbie kicks his pup-pad down the cliff side! Now the pups have to save Ryder... all on their own!

episodes.name: Pups Great Race
episodes.summary: It's Adventure Bay Race Day and the pups are about to race each other all across the town to see who is the fastest pup. One other competitor unexpectedly shows up though: Alex in his super trike!

episodes.name: Pups Take the Cake
episodes.summary: Mr. Porter enters a cake competition and needs Ryder and the pups to help him bake the biggest and tastiest cake. The race is on to get their cake baked and to the competition on time!

episodes.name: Pups and the Beanstalk
episodes.summary: In a dream one of the pups has, Alex is a giant and, without meaning any harm, causes it around Adventure Bay, so the PAW Patrol has to keep him busy and get him back up the beanstalk.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Turbots
episodes.summary: Cap'n Turbot needs to get a picture of the rare blue-footed booby bird. His French cousin, Francois Turbot, decides to help but gets caught on a cliff! It's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue him and bring the two cousins together again.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Camping Trip
episodes.summary: Mayor Goodway, Chickaletta, Rocky, and Skye go camping to earn their Pup Scouts badges, but while searching for berry bushes, Chickaletta falls into a cave! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save their feathered friend!

episodes.name: Pups and the Trouble with Turtles
episodes.summary: Tons of baby turtles are popping up all over the Lookout. Can the PAW Patrol help get them back to their homes before they get hurt?

episodes.name: Pups Save an Elephant Family
episodes.summary:
The pups go on a safari and wind up reuniting a family of elephants.

A group of rowdy kittens wreak havoc on the town.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Woof and Roll Show
episodes.summary: Luke Stars is coming to Adventure Bay! The whole town is looking forward to the pop stars show, especially Rubble and a star struck Mayor Goodway. On the big day, the pups wake up to a mess as a storm has blown the whole town apart, including the stage. The Paw Patrol is busy at work fixing the stage and corralling the eager audience when Luke calls to say the bridge is out. Ryder sends Zuma and Skye to airlift Luke and his equipment from one side of the bridge to safety of Ryder's ATV, then to the stage where he wows the audience, with a little help from Rubble.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Eagle
episodes.summary: While enjoying a hike in the woods, Mayor Goodway's backpack slips down the side of a cliff, with Chickaletta in it! The backpack is perched way out on a limb, with an eagles nest not far away and Mayor Goodway is sure Chickaletta will be the eagles lunch! Ryder calls Chase to winch the backpack and EMT Marshall just in case the chicken falls. No sooner do the pups rescue Chickaletta than they discover the eagle is caught in twine and tied to her own nest. Skye swallows all her fear and rescues the eagle by executing some sneaky maneuvers to get close enough to bite the twine to free the majestic bird. That pups gotta fly!

episodes.name: Pups Bark with Dinosaurs
episodes.summary: The Paw Patrol is on a big excavation dig in the jungle with Cap'n Turbot looking for dinosaur fossils when they unearth 3 fossilized eggs. Before they know what's happening the eggs start to hatch and there are three baby pterodactyls running around Adventure Bay! It's all paws on board for this rescue as Ryder sends the pups to catch the dinos. Just as they're doing that Mayor Goodway and Mr. Porter call to report a Utahraptor is destroying Mr. Porters restaurant, and eating everything in sight! And as soon as they get this news, another call comes in, there's a Triceratop on the railway tracks!! Paw Patrol is on a Roll. Rubble befriends and coaxes the baby Triceratop off the tracks and even gets that dino to help rescue one of the baby pterodactyls. As Chase, Skye and Marshall collect the other two hatchlings, Rocky rigs his peanut dispenser to deploy liver sausages luring the hungry Utahraptor home to the jungle. Soon all the prehistoric creatures are back where they should be, just in time for Rubble to wake from his most vivid dream ever.

episodes.name: Pup-Fu!
episodes.summary: Sensei Yumi is teaching all the pups the ancient art of Pup-Fu. The Paw Patrol and the mischievous kittens from Mayor Humdinger's Kit-tastrophe Crew are both competing for their belts when they come across an ancient scroll that holds all the secrets of the art. Mayor Humdinger steals the scroll and the Paw Patrol is called upon to find and return it to back to Sensei Yumi. It can be dangerous in the wrong hands, so Chase's drone tracks the sneaky Mayor to his secret lair, while Zuma helps them enter by a hidden cave in the water. Super Pup-Fu student Marshall sneaks in quiet as a mouse and together they get the scroll back where it's supposed to be.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Chicken of the Sea
Pups Save the Woof and Roll Show
episodes.summary: Luke Stars is coming to Adventure Bay! The whole town is looking forward to the rock star's show, especially Rubble and a star struck Mayor Goodway. On the big day, the pups wake up to a mess as a storm has blown the whole town apart; including the stage. The PAW Patrol is busy at work fixing the stage and corralling the eager audience when Luke calls to say the bridge is out. Ryder sends Zuma and Skye to airlift Luke and his equipment from one side of the bridge to the safety of Ryder's ATV, then to the stage where he wows the audience with a little help from Rubble.

Ryder calls Chase to winch the backpack and EMT Marshall just in case the chicken falls. No sooner do the pups rescue Chickaletta than they discover the eagle is caught in twine and tied to her own nest. Skye overcomes her fear and rescues the eagle by executing some sneaky maneuvers to get close enough to bite the twine to free the majestic bird. That pup's gotta fly!

episodes.summary: The PAW Patrol is on a big excavation dig in the jungle with Cap'n Turbot looking for dinosaur fossils when they unearth 3 fossilized eggs. Before they know what's happening the eggs start to hatch and there are three baby pterodactyls running around Adventure Bay! It's all paws on board for this rescue as Ryder sends the pups to catch the dinos. Just as they're doing that Mayor Goodway and Mr. Porter call to report a Utahraptor is destroying Mr. Porter's restaurant, and eating everything in sight! And as soon as they get this news, another call comes in, there's a Triceratops on the railway tracks!! PAW Patrol is on a roll. Rubble befriends and coaxes the baby Triceratops off the tracks and even gets that dino to help rescue one of the baby pterodactyls. As Chase, Skye and Marshall collect the other two hatchlings, Rocky rigs his peanut dispenser to deploy liver sausages luring the hungry Utahraptor home to the jungle. Soon all the prehistoric creatures are back where they should be, just in time for Rubble to wake from his most vivid dream ever.

episodes.name: All Star Pups!
episodes.summary: It's monkey mayhem as pups play kickball against Raimondo's team, until an eagle steals the ball that is.

episodes.name: Pups Save Sports Day
episodes.summary: Everest and Skye face the big bird and save the game. The All Star Pups are ready to compete in the summer sports day when Daring Danny X turns the field into an ice rink!

episodes.name: Pups and a Whale of a Tale
Pups Save a Blimp
episodes.summary: Cap'n Turbot's weather blimp is taken by Mayor Humdinger, who plans to use it to change the weather in Foggy Bottom.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Chili Cook-Off
episodes.summary: Mr. Porter's stove explodes right before the chili cook-off.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Teeny Tiny Penguin
episodes.summary: Everest and Jake try to rescue a little penguin and end up floating out to sea on a homemade bridge.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Cat Show
episodes.summary: Katie's kittens are all covered in mud and running amuck, so the pups must round them up before the Cat Show is ruined.

episodes.name: Mission Paw: Quest for the Crown
Pups Save Jake's Cake
episodes.summary: Ryder and the pups must help get a surprise birthday cake up to Jake's cabin.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Wild Ride
episodes.summary: The PAW Patrol must come to the rescue when Alex and Daring Danny X snowboard toward Risky Ridge.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Sleepover
episodes.summary: Farmer Al's animals go missing during a sleepover.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Carnival
episodes.summary: Cornelius escapes from the pig ride at the carnival, and all the prizes have gone missing too.

episodes.name: Mission PAW: Pups Save the Royal Throne
Pups Save Big Hairy
episodes.summary: A huge monkey follows the Paw Patrol home.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Flying Kitty
episodes.summary: Skye must conquer her fear of eagles on a high altitude rescue mission.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Plane
episodes.summary: Mayor Goodway's first flying lesson.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Ace
episodes.summary: A stunt pilot has engine trouble.

episodes.name: Pups Save Daring Danny X
episodes.summary: Daring Danny X attempts a jump over Rattle Snake Canyon

episodes.name: Pups and a Whale of a Tale
episodes.summary: The pups help a baby whale.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Polar Bears
episodes.summary: The pups rescue lost polar bear cubs.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Baby Octopus
episodes.summary: The Sea Patrol must save the day when a baby octopus gets separated from its mother and sinks the Flounder.

episodes.name: Mission PAW
episodes.summary: A collection of the PAW Patrol's Mission PAW rescues.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Runaway Kitties
episodes.summary: The Kit-trastrophe crew gets into the poufy shampoo, and they are blown away.

episodes.name: Pups Save Tiny Marshall
episodes.summary: Marshall dreams he gets shrunk.

episodes.name: Pups Chill Out
episodes.summary: Roger's frozen food delivery truck gets stuck in a ditch.

episodes.name: Pups Save Farmer Alex
episodes.summary: Farmer Yumi's animals stampede toward town.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Shark
episodes.summary: In hopes to have the whole beach to himself, Humdinger makes a robotic shark to scare everyone away.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save the Pier
Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Frozen Flounder
Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Narwhal
Pups Save Puplantis
episodes.summary: Sid Swashbuckle the Pirate and his first pup mate Arrby steal the giant pearl-making shell that gives Puplantis its magic.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Kitty Rescue Crew
Sea Patrol: Pups Save the Sunken Sloop
Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Wigglywhale
Pups Save a High Flying Skye
Sea Patrol: Pups Save the Flying Diving Bell
Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Soggy Farm
Pups Save the Butterflies
episodes.summary: Chickaletta is stuck on a runaway drone and mysterious butterflies cause chaos all around Adventure Bay.

episodes.name: Pups Save an Underground Chicken
episodes.summary: The statue of Chickaletta has been stolen!

episodes.name: Mission PAW: Pups Save the Castle
episodes.summary: As the PAW Patrol enjoyed, King of the Castle, in Barkingburg has broke apart. The Princess has just ruined the castle.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Captain Ryder
episodes.summary: While at the Surfing Board, Ryder discovers that whale is on the edge of a water! He attempts to rescue Whale, but gets stranded himself in the process. He calls the pups for help, but Garbie kicks his pup-pad down the cliff side! Now the pups have to save Captain Ryder and a whale.

episodes.name: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Their Pirated Sea Patroller
Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Royal Kitties
Sea Patrol: Pups Save Tilly Turbot
Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Tigers
Pups and the Mystery of the Driverless Snocat
Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Movie Monster!
Pups Save an Out of Control Mini Patrol
Mission Paw: Pups Save a Royal Concert
Mission Paw: Pups Save the Princess' Pals
Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save a Swamp Creature
Ultimate Rescue: Pups and the Hidden Golden Bones
Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save a Runaway Stargazer
Pups Save a Tower of Pizza
Ultimate Rescue: Pups Stop a Meltdown
Ultimate Rescue: Pups and the Mystery of the Missing Cell Phones
Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Mountain Climbers
Ultimate Rescue: Pup Save Captain Gordy
Pups And The Stinky Bubble Trouble
Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar
episodes.summary: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert!

episodes.name: Pups Save The Yoga Goats
episodes.summary: Farmer Yumi's new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! The PAW Patrol must find the goats and return them safely to Yumi's farm.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack
episodes.summary: The Kitty Catastrophe crew gets super powers, and now those little kittens are causing big problems all over town! It'll take the Mighty Pups and their Super Paws to stop them and restore order to Adventure Bay!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Meet The Mighty Twins
episodes.summary: Super-bandit Ladybird shrieks havoc in Adventure Bay taking all of the town's treasures – including Mayor Goodway! The Mighty Pups team up with new super pals The Mighty Twins to save the day – and the Mayor - in this super heroic adventure!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Save a Giant Chicken
episodes.summary: The Ladybird is back and Chickaletta has super powers! The Mighty Twins join the Mighty Pups to save a Giant Chicken and the town.

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Stop Harold's Deep Freeze
episodes.summary: The Mighty Pups have to stop Harold Humdinger before he puts Adventure Bay in a deep freeze so he can become mayor.

episodes.name: Pups Save Bedtime
episodes.summary: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle. They tried to call the PAW Patrol, but their phone cut out!

episodes.name: Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
episodes.summary: Chickaletta has laid an egg, but it rolled away and is heading through town. The PAW Patrol has to catch it before it breaks!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Manatee
episodes.summary: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to a get a manatee to the swamp!

episodes.name: Pups Save Breakfast
episodes.summary: Mr. Porter and Alex are in a sticky situation - they're up to their ears in maple syrup! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the Porter's and Breakfast!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Land Pirates
episodes.summary: Pirates Alex, Julia, Julius and Chick-ARR-letta, are sent sailing into the desert and get lost! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save these Land pirates.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Birdwatching Turbots
episodes.summary: Cap'n Turbot and Francois chirp need help when a bird-watching contest leaves them up in the air

episodes.name: Pups Save a Bat Family
episodes.summary: A rockslide traps a Bat Family inside their cave, so the PAW Patrol has to free them! The bats search for a new home leads to problems in town though!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Mud Monster
episodes.summary: Snowboarders on Jake's Mountain are stuck on a broken chair lift while a monster is on the loose!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups and the Big Twin Trick
episodes.summary: The Ladybird is up to her old tricks again, but this time the Mighty Twins have a super trick of their own!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Save the Mega Mayor
episodes.summary: Mayor Humdinger finally gets super powers, and it's a total cat-astrophe! The Mighty Pups are summoned to save the Mega Mayor from himself.

episodes.name: Pups Save the Balloon Pups
episodes.summary: Giant balloons have floated away from a parade and it's up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Spider Spies
episodes.summary: The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web. It's up to the PAW Patrol save the spider spies!

episodes.name: Pups Save a White Wolf
episodes.summary: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a white wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Wrong Way Explorer
episodes.summary: Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis, accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into... crocodiles?

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Mighty Pups Versus the Copycat
episodes.summary: The Mighty Pups get Charged Up to take on new super-baddie, The Copycat. It'll take all new powers and gear to take down their most formidable foe to date.

episodes.name: Pups Save a Humsquatch
episodes.summary: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. The PAW Patrol heads to Foggy Bottom to save a Humsquatch!

episodes.name: Pups Save a Far Flung Flying Disc
episodes.summary: When a robo-toy causes mayhem, Ryder knows just who to call to save the far flung flying disc!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Stop a Big Bad Bot
episodes.summary: When Harold Humdinger uses a GIANT ROBOT to take the buildings of Adventure Bay and make his OWN town, the Mighty Pups must save the day!

episodes.name: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Mighty Pups Versus the Dome
episodes.summary: The COPYCAT is BACK and Adventure Bay needs a Mighty Rescue when he traps the entire town under a GIANT DOME!

episodes.name: Pups Rescue a Rescuer
episodes.summary: Mayor Goodway tries to help the PAW Patrol rescue Danny, but the pups end up having to rescue the rescuer, too!

episodes.name: Pups Save the Phantom of the Frog Pond
episodes.summary: A spooky sound forces frogs from their home. The pups must bring them home and solve the mystery of the frog pond phantom.

episodes.summary: Mayor Humdinger dreams that he has found a rainbow stone as he starts to drain all the color out of Adventure Bay. This causes the PAW Patrol to find a way to get Adventure Bay's color back while defeating Mayor Humdinger.
